dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Short-term trend up = SMA20 > SMA50; (2) Breakout down = close < prev_close; (3) White candles = positive body. Exit condition inferred as reversal (price crosses above SMA20). Success rates (38-40%) and other AUTHOR_SILENT parameters documented but not encoded as they are metadata. Pattern: Trend-up with Breakout-down Reversal predicts SHORT direction.

source_rule_text: Trend-up with breakout-down: Predicts reversal direction based on short-term trend and breakout direction
